LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WEST CORK WELDING INC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE DEFAULT ENTERED ON AUGUST 19, 2013 AGAINST DEFENDANT WEST CORK WELDING INC. IS SET ASIDE. WEST CORK WELDING INC. MUST FILE ITS ANSWER WITHIN 10 DAYS AFTER NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. THE ANSWER WIL NOT BE "DEEMED" FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT WEST CORK WELDING INC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS
Granted. No opposition filed. The default entered on August 19, 2013 against defendant West Cork Welding Inc. is set aside. West Cork Welding Inc. must file its answer within 10 days after notice of entry of this order. The answer wil not be "deemed" filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Continued To Jan-08-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
